songs.title: SPES HOUSE / TECH-HOUSE
songs.tags:
Electronic House / Tech-House engineered for modern club punch, nostalgic emotional pads, groovy analog basslines, and dry transients.
Signature hybrid style combining warm pads (deep house), syncopated chords (UK garage), and punchy minimalism (tech-house).
Track must evoke sunset-to-midnight emotion with dancefloor-focused clarity, elegance, and forward motion

songs.title: Coroação de Alegria – Bass & Enchantment
songs.tags: Deep, sustained sub-bass and a commanding 808 kick fused with sine subs drive the house rhythm at 118 BPM in D Dorian. Over this, arpeggiated synth pads radiate joy, layered with divine chant vocals and ethereal choirs. Organic percussion—shakers, toms, hand-drums—sways beneath plucked bell accents with granular reverberation. Cathedral wind echoes and distant thunderfield textures evoke triumphant, mystical ambiance throughout the track, balancing dance energy with spiritual atmosphere.

songs.title: Deep Tech Minimal Spiritual | Deep melodic house & techno journey
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Deep Tech Minimal Spiritual | Deep melodic house & techno journey | Sequential execution system with live energy automation | Designed for multi-layer integration and polyrhythmic coexistence. Each instrument acts as an orbital frequency around a living pulse. Late-night to sunrise club ritual with Brazilian urban rap fusion.]

[PARAMS:]
[BPM: 122–124]
[KEY: G minor → G Dorian (final lift)]
[DURATION: long-form journey | 3 Drops | BAR-based structure only]
[MOOD: sensual, ascendant, precise, transcendent, cinematic underground, late-night to sunrise]

songs.title: Quando a Luz Te Derrubou
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Progressive deep house / melodic house.]
[Spiritual storytelling through emotional observation.]
[Female narrator witnessing the suffering, fall, and calling of Paul (Acts 9).]
[Night-driving energy. Inner prayer disguised as dance music.]
[Tempo steady, hypnotic, emotional evolution over repetition.]

[VOICE PERSONA — FEMALE LEAD:]
[Register: low alto to mezzo-soprano (G3–C5)]
[Timbre: warm (9), intimate (9), slightly smoky (6), emotional restraint (10)]
[Dynamics: subtle — pain held back, never exploded]
[Breath: constant presence, almost touching the mic]
[Vibrato: minimal, controlled]
[Attack: soft consonants, elongated vowels]
[Persona imagery: mulher que ama Paulo em silêncio, observando sua queda, cegueira e transformação à distância.]

songs.title: Deep House, polyrhythmic & polyphonic fusion, cinematic multilayer, OME spatial field
songs.tags:
[STYLE: Deep House, polyrhythmic & polyphonic fusion, cinematic multilayer, OME spatial field]
[MOOD: Immersive, dreamy, hypnotic, sophisticated, uplifting]
[TEMPO: 122 BPM]
[INSTRUMENTATION: Deep subby kick (center), rolling mono bassline, polyphonic analog synth chords (wide stereo), layered evolving pads (moving L↔R↕), polyrhythmic percussion (shakers, congas, rimshots, metallic hits in unique channels), soulful vocal samples (fragmented, reverb/delay modulated), live Rhodes (mid-L, chorus FX), atmospheric guitar licks (pan L→R), creative found sound FX (vinyl crackle, night ambiance, wind swells)]
[OME_PARADIGM: Every layer modulates and pans independently (front/back/L/R/up/down). Polyrhythms interlock (3:4, 5:4, 6:8 patterns). Polyphonic melodies move in 3D space. Spatial FX: morphing delays/reverbs, sweeps/risers. All elements evolve or crossfade—never static.]

songs.title: STYLE: Sertanejo Raiz × Melodic Techno Hybrid
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]

[Sertanejo Raiz / Moda de Viola / Ponteado Tradicional] × [Melodic Techno / Organic House / Deep Techno]
[A fusion between Tião Carreiro’s soul and Stephan Bodzin’s cosmos.]
[Goal: transform the nostalgic storytelling of the viola into a cosmic pulse — a ritual between terra and máquina.]
[Designed for both: silent dawn on the farm and 3 A.M. at Burning Man.]

[MOOD:]

[Spiritual, melancholic, ancestral, hypnotic, transcendent, emotional.]

[TEMPO:]

[112 BPM → hybrid groove oscillating between 3/4 caipira swing and 4/4 techno grid.]
[Kick steady; viola rhythmic syncopation creates the human time feel.]

songs.title: � [SONG_TITLE: EVIDÊNCIAS — VIOLA MODULAR FUSION]
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Hybrid genre: traditional Brazilian "Moda de Viola" fused with Melodic Techno and Organic House.]
[Concept: a spiritual crossover between human tradition and machine consciousness.]
[Designed for open-air stages at night or headphone immersion under the stars.]
[The sound merges rural storytelling with digital transcendence — a ritual between “Earth and Circuit.”]

[MOOD:]
[Spiritual, nostalgic, hypnotic, ancestral, melancholic, transcendent.]

[TEMPO:]
[112 BPM | hybrid rhythm oscillating between 3/4 caipira swing and 4/4 techno pulse.]
[Organic feel — kick steady, viola flows freely over the grid.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[D Major → D Mixolydian flavor for organic resonance.]

songs.title: O TEMPO FALA DO AMOR
songs.tags:
[CHARACTER / ESSENCE:]
[Entity: Time — narrating its reflections on Love. The voice of Time is two-layered: a soft male tone and a light female tone, with gentle echoes representing the flow of years. Love appears as the subject of the lyrics, but the narrator is Time itself.]

[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[A melodic Deep House track with cinematic storytelling elements. Influences include Jon Hopkins (expansive ambience), Kygo's (emotive melodies), and Brazilian classical lines for the violin.]

songs.tags: Deep Sensual House with warm emotional textures, smooth swing (4–6%), deep sub softness, silky percussion, and intimate atmospheric layers. songs.tags: A 124 BPM organic house and tech-house journey blending tribal drums, deep bass, groovy hi-hats, and layered claps. Atmospheric synth pads and processed, fragmented ethereal vocals float over immersive textures, with field recordings and natural percussion woven into hypnotic, smooth transitions.

songs.title: O Lugar pra Te Adorar (Remix)
songs.tags:
[SONG_TITLE]  
[O Lugar Pra Te Adorar – Spiritual Ambient House Version]  

[GENRE]  
[Spiritual Ambient House | Organic Downtempo | Worship Deep House]  

[TEMPO]  
[118–120 BPM]  

[KEY]  
[G major – Flowing, warm, and uplifting]  

[STYLE_REFERENCE]  
[Lane 8 (ambient house textures), Liquid Bloom (organic downtempo), Tycho (atmospheric grooves), (worshipful intimacy)]  

[MOOD]  
[Serene, Sacred, Intimate, Meditative, Deeply Uplifting, Spiritual Flow]  

[INSTRUMENTATION]  
- **Felt Grand Piano:** soft touch, warm, with long ambient reverb.  
- **Ambient Electric Guitar:** clean tone with shimmer delay and lush stereo spread.  
- **Warm Analog Bass:** soft, deep sub presence, melodic bass grooves that flow.  
- **Organic Percussion:** brushed snares, soft toms, frame drums, gentle shakers, subtle congas.  
- **Melodic Synths:** airy pads, analog saws with low filter, gentle shimmer on high frequencies.  
- **Arpeggiated Plucks:** glassy synth bells or mallets ]

songs.title: O Lugar Pra Te Adorar
songs.tags: A spiritual ambient house track unfolds with airy pads and ethereal textures, layered over a spacious 4/4 deep house beat. Subtle synth arpeggios weave through echoing atmospheres, with gliding bass, gentle piano, and harmonic choir-like vocal pads. The breakdown swells with reverberant bells, gradually rebuilding to a soulful deep house groove textured by evolving percussion, warm chord stabs, and uplifting melodic progressions.

songs.title: O Lugar Pra Te Adorar
songs.tags: A spacious ambient house texture opens with airy pads, atmospheric samples, and subtle field recordings. Soft, pulsing 4/4 house kick enters, joined by deep bass, shimmering synth layers, and gentle percussive elements. Lush, evolving chords fill the breakdowns, while filtered arpeggios and ethereal vocal layers rise and fall with the energy. Reverb-drenched piano and subtle sound design provide a meditative, uplifting atmosphere throughout, progressing through dynamic builds and serene drops for reflective immersion.
